_meta.description: Building information section registered input nodes. These are the foundational inputs from Section 02 (and S05) that all other sections depend on. Includes building geometry (floor area, storeys, ceiling height), building classification (occupancy, reference standard, analysis mode), carbon benchmarking selection, typology selection, user-modelled embodied carbon, project metadata, and energy fuel prices. G-classified fields are shared across all models; A-classified fields are model-specific.

instances.label: Number of Storeys
instances.note: Used by TGS4 category determination (Part 9 vs Part 3 boundary at 3 storeys)

instances.label: Major Occupancy
instances.note: Drives heating setpoint (22°C for Residential/Care), coldest day design temp, TGS4 category, and water use defaults

instances.label: Reference Standard
instances.note: Selects reference model code minimum values. PH variants override heating setpoint to 18°C.

instances.label: Analysis Mode (Utility Bills / Target)
instances.note: Controls whether Actual column in S01 shows utility bill TEUI or N/A

instances.label: Carbon Benchmarking Standard
instances.note: Selects embodied carbon target value via CARBON_TARGETS or TGS4_CAPS lookup

instances.label: Typology Selection
instances.note: Drives typology-based embodied carbon lookup (i_39). Options: Pt.9 Res. Stick Frame, Pt.9 Small Mass Timber, Pt.3 Mass Timber, Pt.3 Concrete, Pt.3 Steel, Pt.3 Office, Modelled Value

instances.label: User Modelled Embodied Carbon (kgCO2e/m²)
instances.note: User-editable embodied carbon value. Used when typology='Modelled Value' or standard='Self Reported'.

instances.label: Electricity Price ($/kWh)
instances.note: Used in S15 energy cost calculations (d_141, h_141)

instances.label: Gas Price ($/m³)
instances.note: Used in S15 other fuel cost calculation (l_141)

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInputs in BuildingInfoNodes.js)
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by downstream computation nodes

preconditions.description: Floor area is used as divisor in intensity calculations throughout

invariants.description: Building must have at least one storey

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of all intensity metrics (TEUI, TEDI, CEDI, GHGI, per-m² values)
Affects heating setpoint, coldest day temperature, TGS4 category, water use defaults
Switches reference model code minimum values, may override heating setpoint for PH
Embodied carbon target derived from TGS4_CAPS by occupancy category and storeys
behavior.note: Cap does NOT vary by material type

behavior.output: i_39 uses userModelledEmbodiedCarbon instead of TYPOLOGY_CAPS lookup
behavior.note: Allows user to input their own modelled embodied carbon value

behavior.output: S15 cost calculations (d_141, h_141, l_141) recompute
behavior.note: Prices are stored as strings with $ prefix, parsed via parseNum

edgeCases.handling: parseNum strips non-numeric characters before parsing
